ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_topologies" (
  "topology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topology */,
  "topology_name" TEXT /* Name of the topology (e.g., mesh, star) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topology */,
  "topology_image" TEXT /* Reference to an image or diagram of the topology */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the topology */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the topology was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the topology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_topologies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "topology_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topology ID */,
  "nodes_count" INTEGER /* Total number of nodes in the topology */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Mode of the network operation */,
  "loss_pct" REAL /* Loss percentage during operation */,
  "mean_throughput" REAL /* Mean throughput in KBps */,
  "mean_latency" REAL /* Mean latency in milliseconds */,
  "mean_packet_size" REAL /* Mean packet size in bytes */,
  "mean_pdr" REAL /* Mean packet delivery ratio */,
  "mean_hops_to_root" INTEGER /* Mean number of hops to the root node */,
  "min_hops_to_root" INTEGER /* Minimum hops to the root node */,
  "max_hops_to_root" INTEGER /* Maximum hops to the root node */,
  "std_dev_hops" REAL /* Standard deviation of number of hops to root node */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Description of the test environment (e.g., lab, production) */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test software used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_topology_id FOREIGN KEY ("topology_id") REFERENCES network_topologies ("topology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, analyst, manager) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metric */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_density_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "topology_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topology ID */,
  "node_density" REAL /* Node density tested (number of nodes per area) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., 'passed', 'failed') */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test software used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_node_density_tests_topology_id FOREIGN KEY ("topology_id") REFERENCES network_topologies ("topology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test ID */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter tested */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter value */,
  "parameter_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_parameters_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES node_density_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_metrics" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical metric entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric ID */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the recorded metrics */,
  "mean_throughput" REAL /* Mean throughput in KBps */,
  "mean_latency" REAL /* Mean latency in milliseconds */,
  "mean_pdr" REAL /* Mean packet delivery ratio */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the historical metrics were recorded */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Description of the test environment (e.g., lab, production) */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the test */,
  "test_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test in seconds */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test software used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_notifications" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric ID */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high latency, packet loss) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  "alert_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_notifications_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_notifications_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "topology_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topology ID */,
  "simulation_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was run */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the simulation in seconds */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the simulation (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "simulation_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the simulation */,
  "simulation_environment" TEXT /* Description of the simulation environment (e.g., lab, production) */,
  "simulation_version" TEXT /* Version of the simulation software used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_simulations_topology_id FOREIGN KEY ("topology_id") REFERENCES network_topologies ("topology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation ID */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric ID */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the recorded result */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the result */,
  "result_version" TEXT /* Version of the result data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES network_simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, suggestion) */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., pending, resolved, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "performed_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the maintenance action */,
  "action_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance action (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "action_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the maintenance action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
